title: ExternalConfig
content:
# ExternalConfig

Inherits from: AppBaseConfig


Represents the configuration for an external (docker) app.


## Methods


### to_manifest(read_schemas: bool, workdir: Path) -> AppManifest
summary: Represents the configuration for an external (docker) app.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.application import ExternalConfig

# Usage example
app = ExternalConfig()
